nasb.text: The Lord of hosts, the God of Israel, says, “Behold, I am going to punish Amon of Thebes, and Pharaoh, and Egypt along with her gods and her kings, even Pharaoh and those who trust in him.

esv.text: The Lord of hosts, the God of Israel, said: “Behold, I am bringing punishment upon Amon of Thebes, and Pharaoh and Egypt and her gods and her kings, upon Pharaoh and those who trust in him.

cnv.text: 萬軍之耶和華以色列的　神說：“看哪！我必懲罰挪的亞捫神、法老和那些倚靠法老的人。

ccb.text: 以色列的上帝——万军之耶和华说：“看啊，我要惩罚提比斯的神明亚扪和埃及的其他神明、法老、首领以及依靠法老的人。
